name: devsecops-agency
description: A fully autonomous AI software-development company in a plugin. You speak only to the CEO; the CEO holds board meetings with Chiefs, each of whom runs a council of specialists. Research → Product → Architecture → Security → Execution → Quality → DevOps → Docs → Legal. Security-first (STRIDE + OWASP Top 10) by default. Ships to GitHub. v0.2.1 adds durable cross-project memory (three-tier Light/Deep/REM dreaming) + append-only JSONL session logs. v0.2.2 adds scoped AGENTS.md hierarchy + deterministic ordering. v0.2.3 adds gates (green/yellow/red/n/a with blocking-vs-informing councils) + taskflow (six-state machine + 2-attempt fix-loop cap). v0.2.4 adds worktree parallelism with atomic scope-checked merge + structural-conflict escalation. v0.2.5 adds skill-creator runtime roster extension + per-agent model tiering (Opus CEO / Sonnet Chiefs / Haiku specialists) + notify (rate-limited push) + novelty-gated memory writes. v0.3.0 starts the 'company release': Wave 1 (this alpha) adds durable corporate paper trail — `vision-doc` (workspace VISION.md owning mission + OKRs + non-goals, with a 3-bullet KR slice prepended to every Chief dispatch), `okr` (per-project OKR derivation, per-report alignment scoring, quarter roll-up), `adr` (decision receipts in _decisions/ADR-NNNN-<slug>.md on every material decision, immutable after acceptance), and `meeting-minutes` (durable minutes for user/board/blocking-council/red-team/audit/retro meetings with action items backed by taskflow tasks). Waves 2–7 add marketing + strategy councils + top-5 user meeting, people-ops + audit, never-give-up resilience ladder, eval + benchmarks + budget, red-team + self-modifying playbooks, and SRE + tool-scout + provenance.
